description: Create a directional street map for an event invitation in Wondershare EdrawMax. The map must include a street intersection with roads labeled 'Main Street' and 'Oak Avenue'. Include a building or landmark labeled 'Grand Convention Center' at a corner, a parking area labeled 'Parking', and an indicator for the 'Entrance'. Save the editable diagram as /home/ga/Documents/event_map.eddx and export a PNG image to /home/ga/Documents/event_map.png.
